creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to Daniel Engberg from comment #0)
> The only user left in tree is ftp/wget
Then it still appears to have value.
> Last update over a decade ago
Then there will be little maintenance cost,
and if there are no security reports, there
are no risks.
This is not an attempt to create, or maintain a museum.
It is the acknowledgement that the more options something
possesses, the more potential value it has. Who doesn't
like choices? I could see where this lib could help in
the creation, and parsing of the VULN database and reports.

I vote we keep it.
